device_id.description: Unique identifier of the device uploading the bundle

bundle_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific support bundle (UUID)

timestamp.description: Time when the support bundle was generated

bundle_size_bytes.description: Size of the support bundle archive in bytes

bundle_url.description: URL or local storage path to access/download the support bundle

redaction_applied.description: Whether telemetry and logs have been run through the local privacy redaction pipeline

metadata.description: Optional key-value pairs with extra diagnostic context
